option.source: @{Select distinct BRANCH_ORG_ID , BRANCH_ORG_NM from IBS.T5_ORG where BRANCH_ORG_ID!='9990' and HEAD_ORG_ID='9990' and ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' order by BRANCH_ORG_ID}
option.label: BRANCH_ORG_NM

option.source: @{Select distinct PSTN_TYPE , PSTN_TYPE_NM from PUB.PERSONNEL where PSTN_TYPE in ('04') group by PSTN_TYPE, PSTN_TYPE_NM , SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM order by PSTN_TYPE }
option.label: PSTN_TYPE_NM

option.source: @{Select distinct SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM from PUB.PERSONNEL where PSTN_TYPE='#PSTN_TYPE#' group by PSTN_TYPE, PSTN_TYPE_NM , SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM order by SUB_PSTN_TYPE }
option.label: SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM

select.value: SELECT YEAR ,BRANCH_ORG_ID ,PSTN_TYPE ,SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,COMMISSION ,EFF_FLAG ,MODIFY_PEOPLE ,MODIFY_TIME ,MODIFY_IP ,REMARK ,'原时间为：'||substr(MODIFY_TIME,1,19)||'机构为：'||BRANCH_ORG_ID||'主考核类别为：'||PSTN_TYPE||'子考核类别为：'||SUB_PSTN_TYPE||'比例为：'||COMMISSION||'提交人为：'||MODIFY_PEOPLE||'提交ip为：'||MODIFY_IP AS REMARK1 FROM IBS.T3_COMMISSION_RATIO WHERE EFF_FLAG=1 and {#condition#} ORDER by YEAR,BRANCH_ORG_ID,PSTN_TYPE,SUB_PSTN_TYPE

option.source: @{Select distinct BRANCH_ORG_ID , BRANCH_ORG_NM from IBS.T5_ORG where BRANCH_ORG_ID!='9990' and HEAD_ORG_ID='9990' and ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' order by BRANCH_ORG_ID}
option.label: BRANCH_ORG_NM

option.source: @{Select distinct PSTN_TYPE , PSTN_TYPE_NM from PUB.PERSONNEL group by PSTN_TYPE, PSTN_TYPE_NM , SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM order by PSTN_TYPE }
option.label: PSTN_TYPE_NM

option.source: @{Select distinct SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM from PUB.PERSONNEL where PSTN_TYPE='#PSTN_TYPE#' group by PSTN_TYPE, PSTN_TYPE_NM , SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM order by SUB_PSTN_TYPE }
option.label: SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM
